title: auerodendron cubense var. maisiana
intro: Auerodendron cubense var. maisiana, also known as Auerodendron maisiana or Dillenia maisiana, is a plant species in the family Dilleniaceae. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, particularly in Southeast Asia. The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions, including fever, wounds, and digestive issues. Auerodendron cubense var. maisiana can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health.
